seoTitle: How to Sell on Gumroad's Discover Marketplace
metaDescription: Learn how to get your products eligible for Gumroad Discover, optimize tags and categories, and understand the Discover fee structure.
intro: Gumroad Discover is the platform's built-in marketplace that can send extra buyers your way through recommendations and search, but products need to meet certain criteria to show up there. This guide covers checking your eligibility, optimizing your listing for discovery, and understanding the revenue split involved.

steps.heading: Check Discover eligibility
steps.body: Review whether your account meets the requirements, such as reaching a minimum level of past sales.

steps.heading: Confirm your product is public
steps.body: Make sure your product's visibility settings allow it to appear in the public marketplace.

steps.heading: Choose a category and tags
steps.body: Select an accurate category and relevant search tags so the recommendation system can surface your product.

steps.heading: Polish your visuals
steps.body: Upload strong cover images and preview graphics, since these influence how buyers perceive your listing.

steps.heading: Understand the fee structure
steps.body: Review how Discover's revenue split compares to your standard sales fee before relying heavily on it.

faq.question: What is Gumroad Discover?
faq.answer: It's Gumroad's built-in marketplace and recommendation engine that can surface eligible products to new buyers.

faq.question: Do all Gumroad products qualify for Discover?
faq.answer: No, products generally need to meet eligibility criteria, such as a minimum sales history, to appear in Discover.

faq.question: Does Discover charge a different fee than regular sales?
faq.answer: Yes, Discover sales typically involve a different revenue split compared to sales from your own direct links.

faq.question: How do tags affect my visibility in Discover?
faq.answer: Accurate, relevant tags help the recommendation algorithm match your product with interested buyers.
